criteria.description: All existing tests pass. No test regressions introduced.
All acceptance criteria from the feature artefact are satisfied.
No regressions in the area touched by the change.
Code has been reviewed by the Reviewer role and all critical/major findings resolved.
Documentation updated if the change affects public APIs, configuration, or user-facing behaviour.
No known security vulnerabilities introduced. Secrets not committed.

notes: This is the project-level Definition of Done. Edit .floe/dod.json to customise criteria for your project.
